name: @axicharts/charts-echarts
description: ECharts adapters for AxiCharts pie, candlestick, waterfall, and heatmap.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts --external react --external react-dom --external echarts --external echarts-wordcloud --external echarts-liquidfill --external @axicharts/charts-canvas --clean
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts --external react --external react-dom --external echarts --external echarts-wordcloud --external echarts-liquidfill --external @axicharts/charts-canvas --watch
